'''Quarras''' were vicious predators native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]]. They were large, four-legged reptilian creatures that possessed massive horned snouts filled with immense teeth. They were traditionally used for capital punishment by the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronians]], especially in cases dealing with mass [[Death/Legends|murderers]] and traitors to the lawful government. This practice prevented Devaron from joining the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi: Aayla Secura]]''
